calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, the case is ordered dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: JoAnn Bryce, #3321. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2001 Continued To Jan-22-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Pltff. in Pro Per sanctioned $350.00, failure appear. The OSC is re-set to 1/22/01 at 1:30 PM, Department 212. Proceedings repoted by: Ron Sinclair. (212)
